event.message: Lyric analysis timed out after retry budget

mockCodexResult.summary: The lyric analysis pipeline needs broader timeout and retry design work.
mockCodexResult.rootCause: The failure spans provider latency, LLM timeout policy, and batch retry behavior.
evidence: The fix likely crosses batch and translation boundaries

githubIssue.title: Investigate lyric analysis timeout policy
githubIssue.body: Sentry shows repeated lyric analysis timeouts. Investigate provider latency, LLM timeout, and batch retry boundaries before changing code.

mockCodexResult.sentryNote: 원인은 단일 코드 수정이 아니라 lyric analysis timeout/retry 정책 문제로 보입니다. 큰 개선 이슈로 넘깁니다.
